summary: Tested all 3 soul profile system fixes. All confirmed working. Backend: 19/20 tests passed. Frontend: all 7 pillar pages show live soul score correctly, PillarSoulModal filter logic verified, archetype shown on Celebrate page.

fix1_soul_score_sync.api_test: PASS - GET /api/pet-soul/profile/pet-mojo-7327ad56 returns scores.overall=100.0, tier='soul_master', answered_count=26

fix2_pillar_soul_modal_filter.code_review: PASS - PillarSoulModal.jsx lines 123-127 filter questions against pet.doggy_soul_answers (both soul_field and id)
fix2_pillar_soul_modal_filter.all_done_screen: PASS - 'All done!' screen renders when totalQ===0 (all questions already answered)
fix2_pillar_soul_modal_filter.celebrate_page_mojo: PASS - shows 'Mojo's soul is fully known. Mira knows everything.' confirming 0 new questions
fix2_pillar_soul_modal_filter.soul_answers_api: PASS - soul_answers has 93 entries (general_nature, describe_3_words etc all present)

fix3_infer_archetype.reason_field: PASS - returns reason='Score 9: high energy + outdoor lover + pulls on leash + adventurous spirit + action-oriented'
fix3_infer_archetype.no_auth: PASS - works without auth token (optional auth confirmed)
fix3_infer_archetype.db_persistence: PASS - primary_archetype='wild_explorer' persisted to pet record
fix3_infer_archetype.celebrate_page_archetype: PASS - Celebrate page shows 'Playful . Loyal . The Wild Explorer' in traits bar

critical_code_review_comments: Duplicate React keys warning in console for pet-home page (paper-health-wallet, adv-health-monitor, shopify-IDs) - pre-existing issue unrelated to these fixes
Shop/Services pages need slightly longer load time for PillarContext to initialize vs direct navigation - not a bug, context loads asynchronously

success_rate.backend: 95% (19/20 tests passed, 1 skipped - no pet without answers available for default archetype test)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (all 7 pillar pages show live soul score, PillarSoulModal filter working, archetype shown on Celebrate page)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 soul profile fixes are working. Fix1: Live soul score fetch from GET /api/pet-soul/profile/{id} on all 7 pillar pages (Care/Dine/Go/Play/Learn/Services/Shop) - verified showing 100% for Mojo. Fix2: PillarSoulModal.jsx filters already-answered questions and shows All Done screen (totalQ===0). Fix3: POST /api/pets/{id}/infer-archetype works, returns archetype/label/reason, persists to DB, Celebrate page shows archetype in traits. Mojo archetype is 'wild_explorer'/'The Wild Explorer'. Note: test for 'default archetype for pet without answers' was skipped as all 17 pets for this account appear to have soul answers.
